title: Bitcoin Payment Processor | OpenNode
excerpt: A simple Bitcoin payment processor for any business. Accept Bitcoin payments, receive Bitcoin donations and send Bitcoin payouts all on the OpenNode platform.
content_html:
Bitcoin payments at
the speed of now

Get lightning-fast, low-cost bitcoin payments and payouts
for your business with our powerful API, ecommerce
plugins, or hosted payment pages.

Secure bitcoin processing
infrastructure for your business

Bitcoin & local currencies

Accept bitcoin and receive bitcoin or local currencies like EUR, GBP, USD and more. Explore Capabilities

Payments & Payouts

Accept bitcoin payments from anywhere. Fund global payouts with local currency. Explore Capabilities

Invoices

Accept bitcoin with professional invoices using our billing templates. Explore Capabilities

Settlement

Receive funds in the currency of your choice using Split Settlement. Explore Capabilities

Easy-to-use bitcoin payment
processing for any business

Integrate OpenNode to grow your business with Bitcoin.

Why OpenNode?

Protect your business from bitcoin price changes

Automatically convert bitcoin to local currencies at the time of payment.

Get paid and pay out at the speed of Lightning

Process and settle bitcoin payments instantly through the Lightning Network.

Keep your revenue

Say goodbye to fraud and chargebacks. We transfer value, and always keep your data safe.

Go Global

Use bitcoin for speedy, secure, cross-border payments.

Developer-friendly Bitcoin
payment processing

Easy-to-use APIs

Integrate instant, low-cost global payments into any business or application with just 10 lines of code.

Plug-and-play Integration

Get OpenNode up and running in minutes. Then get back to doing what you do best.

API documentation

const opennode = require('opennode');
opennode.setCredentials('88d47ebb-4714–4f18–8e1a–b48ef0bala40');

const charge = await opennode.createCharge({
  amount:100,
  currency:'USD',
});

Try OpenNode...
no strings attached!

How we’ve helped other businesses

How we’ve helped other businesses

We integrated easily with OpenNode's API to accept bitcoin transactions both on- and off-chain with minimal fuss.

Rusty Nash CEO of Gift Off Read the full article

Everybody’s got something to say about Bitcoin.
We cut through the noise.

Read the blog

Knowledge is power.

Sign up for our newsletter.

content_html_zh:
以现在的速度进行比特币支付

通过我们强大的 API、电子商务插件或托管支付页面，为您的企业获得闪电般快速、低成本的比特币支付和付款。

为您的企业提供安全的比特币处理基础设施

比特币和当地货币

Accept bitcoin and receive bitcoin or local currencies like EUR, GBP, USD and more. Explore Capabilities

付款与支出

Accept bitcoin payments from anywhere. Fund global payouts with local currency. Explore Capabilities

发票

Accept bitcoin with professional invoices using our billing templates. Explore Capabilities

沉降

Receive funds in the currency of your choice using Split Settlement. Explore Capabilities

适合任何企业的易于使用的比特币支付处理

集成 OpenNode，利用比特币发展您的业务。

为什么选择 OpenNode？

保护您的企业免受比特币价格变化的影响

付款时自动将比特币转换为当地货币。

以闪电般的速度获得付款和付款

通过闪电网络即时处理和结算比特币支付。

保留您的收入

告别欺诈和退款。 我们传递价值，并始终保证您的数据安全。

走向全球

使用比特币进行快速、安全的跨境支付。

开发者友好的比特币支付处理

易于使用的 API

只需 10 行代码即可将即时、低成本的全球支付集成到任何业务或应用程序中。

即插即用集成

在几分钟内即可启动并运行 OpenNode。 然后回去做你最擅长的事情。

API文档

1 2 3 4 5 6 7 const opennode = require('opennode'); opennode.setCredentials('88d47ebb-4714–4f18–8e1a–b48ef0bala40'); const charge = wait opennode.createCharge({ 金额:100, 货币:'USD', });

尝试 OpenNode...没有任何附加条件！

我们如何帮助其他企业

我们如何帮助其他企业

我们轻松地与 OpenNode 的 API 集成，轻松接受链上和链下的比特币交易。

Rusty Nash Gift Off 首席执行官 阅读全文

关于比特币，每个人都有话要说。 我们消除了噪音。
